summary: 주간 큐레이터 패스 (2회차). 전체 1,176 스킬 스캔. 라이프사이클 전환 없음 (모든 스킬 30일 이내 사용). 통합 실행 4건 누계: auto-distill -> auto-distill-v2, tdd -> test-driven-development (이번 실행), kwp-cowork-cowork-plugin-customizer -> kwp-cowork-plugin-customizer, agency-data-analytics-reporter -> agency-analytics-reporter (이전 실행).

consolidations.reason: v2는 v1의 완전한 상위집합 — 멘탈모델 식별 개선, 표현 DNA 강화, 증거 테이블 + 신뢰도 점수 추가. v1에만 있는 고유 콘텐츠 없음.
test-driven-development (384줄)이 tdd (112줄)의 완전한 상위집합. tdd는 외부 파일(tests.md, mocking.md) 참조에 의존하지만 test-driven-development는 독립형. 고유 콘텐츠 없음.
Near-duplicate; kwp-cowork-plugin-customizer is superset (178 lines vs 161, includes Examples and Error Handling sections, Korean triggers)
Near-duplicate; agency-analytics-reporter is superset (385 lines vs 75, full agent persona with capabilities)

skipped_consolidations.reason: RISKY: kwp-cowork-create-plugin uses ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} path variable vs relative paths in cowork variant. Load-bearing difference for different deployment environments. Requires human review.
AMBIGUOUS: setup is a prerequisite phase for the tutor, but merging requires restructuring docs-tutor SKILL.md. Recommend human-guided consolidation.
KEEP_SEPARATE: qa-tester is domain-specific (game studio QA agent); qa-test-expert is generic test generation. Different audiences and use cases.
